entity.name: Repository of databases on human brain connectomics: structural connectivity (DTI, tractography) and functional connectivity (fMRI), including brain network maps and interindividual variability. Data compiled and organized for neuroscience research.

wasDerivedFrom.description: Compiled from publicly available secondary sources
